title: NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina Part 5: DNA Purification
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol is part 5 of a 10 part series. Please look at deck map and liquid legend below. Note: the TE buffer can accommodate 3 columns of sample per column of wash. Each ethanol column can accommodate 4 columns of sample. If running more than one column of reagent, the volumes should be split equally among all columns.
steps_raw: This protocol is part 5 of a 10 part series. Please look at deck map and liquid legend below. Note: the TE buffer can accommodate 3 columns of sample per column of wash. Each ethanol column can accommodate 4 columns of sample. If running more than one column of reagent, the volumes should be split equally among all columns.
keywords: NEBNext® Ultra™ II Directional RNA Library Prep
materials_raw: Opentrons 96 Well Aluminum Block with Generic PCR Strip 200 µL
